timeline_description: Major political and social milestones in the history of the Berlin Wall.
title: Germany divided into occupation zones
description: Allied powers divided Germany into occupation zones after the Second World War.

timeline_description: Major political and social milestones in the history of the Berlin Wall.
title: Berlin divided into sectors
description: Berlin was divided among the Allied powers despite lying deep inside the Soviet zone.

timeline_description: Major political and social milestones in the history of the Berlin Wall.
title: Berlin Blockade begins
description: The Soviet Union blocked land access to West Berlin, triggering a major Cold War crisis.

timeline_description: Major political and social milestones in the history of the Berlin Wall.
title: Berlin Airlift ends
description: The Western Allies ended the airlift after sustaining West Berlin for nearly a year.

timeline_description: Major political and social milestones in the history of the Berlin Wall.
title: Federal Republic of Germany founded
description: West Germany was established in the western occupation zones.

timeline_description: Major political and social milestones in the history of the Berlin Wall.
title: German Democratic Republic founded
description: East Germany was established in the Soviet zone.

timeline_description: Major political and social milestones in the history of the Berlin Wall.
title: Inner German border tightened
description: The East German regime hardened the broader border with West Germany while Berlin remained a weak point.

timeline_description: Major political and social milestones in the history of the Berlin Wall.
title: East German uprising suppressed
description: A mass uprising in East Germany was crushed with Soviet support.

timeline_description: Major political and social milestones in the history of the Berlin Wall.
title: Khrushchev issues Berlin ultimatum
description: The Soviet Union renewed pressure on the status of Berlin.

timeline_description: Major political and social milestones in the history of the Berlin Wall.
title: Construction of the Berlin Wall begins
description: East German authorities sealed the border and began building barriers through Berlin.

timeline_description: Major political and social milestones in the history of the Berlin Wall.
title: Checkpoint Charlie standoff
description: US and Soviet tanks faced each other in one of the most dangerous moments of the Berlin crisis.

timeline_description: Major political and social milestones in the history of the Berlin Wall.
title: Wall system expanded and reinforced
description: Temporary barriers gave way to a more elaborate and deadly border system.

timeline_description: Major political and social milestones in the history of the Berlin Wall.
title: Kennedy visits West Berlin
description: John F. Kennedy publicly affirmed Western support for West Berlin.

timeline_description: Major political and social milestones in the history of the Berlin Wall.
title: Four Power Agreement on Berlin signed
description: The major powers eased tensions and clarified access arrangements for Berlin.

timeline_description: Major political and social milestones in the history of the Berlin Wall.
title: Transit Agreement takes effect
description: Travel and transit between West Berlin and West Germany became more regulated and stable.

timeline_description: Major political and social milestones in the history of the Berlin Wall.
title: Helsinki Final Act signed
description: Human-rights provisions later influenced dissent in Eastern Europe, including East Germany.

timeline_description: Major political and social milestones in the history of the Berlin Wall.
title: Reagan challenges Soviet policy in Berlin
description: Ronald Reagan called for the wall to come down in a symbolic Cold War speech.

timeline_description: Major political and social milestones in the history of the Berlin Wall.
title: Hungary opens its border with Austria
description: The breach in the Iron Curtain increased pressure on East Germany.

timeline_description: Major political and social milestones in the history of the Berlin Wall.
title: East German emigration crisis deepens
description: Large numbers of East Germans fled through neighboring countries, undermining the regime.

timeline_description: Major political and social milestones in the history of the Berlin Wall.
title: Berlin Wall opened
description: East German authorities unexpectedly opened border crossings, ending the wall's function as a sealed barrier.

timeline_description: Major political and social milestones in the history of the Berlin Wall.
title: Border controls effectively end
description: Monetary, economic, and social union made the former border largely obsolete.

timeline_description: Major political and social milestones in the history of the Berlin Wall.
title: German reunification completed
description: The two German states were formally reunified.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the history of smallpox control, vaccination, and global eradication.
title: Variolation practiced in China
description: Early forms of variolation were used in China to confer protection against smallpox.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the history of smallpox control, vaccination, and global eradication.
title: Variolation used in parts of Asia
description: Methods of inoculation spread in parts of Asia before reaching Europe.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the history of smallpox control, vaccination, and global eradication.
title: Lady Mary Wortley Montagu observes variolation
description: She reported Ottoman variolation practices to Britain.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the history of smallpox control, vaccination, and global eradication.
title: Variolation introduced in Britain
description: Variolation began to spread in Britain after growing interest in Ottoman methods.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the history of smallpox control, vaccination, and global eradication.
title: Variolation controversy in Boston
description: Cotton Mather and Zabdiel Boylston supported inoculation during a smallpox outbreak.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the history of smallpox control, vaccination, and global eradication.
title: Jenner performs first successful vaccination experiment
description: Edward Jenner tested cowpox-based protection against smallpox.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the history of smallpox control, vaccination, and global eradication.
title: Jenner publishes vaccination findings
description: Publication helped spread vaccination as an alternative to variolation.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the history of smallpox control, vaccination, and global eradication.
title: Vaccination spreads in Europe and North America
description: Cowpox vaccination was increasingly adopted outside Britain.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the history of smallpox control, vaccination, and global eradication.
title: Spanish Balmis Expedition begins
description: Spain launched a major campaign to carry smallpox vaccination across its empire.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the history of smallpox control, vaccination, and global eradication.
title: Britain bans variolation
description: British law prohibited variolation and promoted free vaccination.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the history of smallpox control, vaccination, and global eradication.
title: Britain makes infant vaccination compulsory
description: Compulsory vaccination expanded state involvement in disease control.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the history of smallpox control, vaccination, and global eradication.
title: Leicester anti-vaccination protest
description: Public resistance to compulsory vaccination became highly visible.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the history of smallpox control, vaccination, and global eradication.
title: Global eradication proposal made at WHO
description: The Soviet Union proposed a worldwide campaign to eradicate smallpox.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the history of smallpox control, vaccination, and global eradication.
title: WHO launches first global eradication program
description: The World Health Organization adopted an initial eradication effort.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the history of smallpox control, vaccination, and global eradication.
title: Intensified Smallpox Eradication Program begins
description: WHO dramatically expanded surveillance and vaccination efforts.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the history of smallpox control, vaccination, and global eradication.
title: India intensifies search-and-containment strategy
description: Targeted containment became central to the campaign in endemic regions.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the history of smallpox control, vaccination, and global eradication.
title: Last case of Variola major recorded
description: The final known naturally occurring case of the more severe form of smallpox was identified.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the history of smallpox control, vaccination, and global eradication.
title: Last naturally occurring smallpox case recorded
description: Ali Maow Maalin became the last known person infected by naturally occurring smallpox.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the history of smallpox control, vaccination, and global eradication.
title: Laboratory-acquired case in Birmingham
description: A laboratory accident caused the last known human death from smallpox.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the history of smallpox control, vaccination, and global eradication.
title: WHO declares smallpox eradicated
description: The World Health Assembly officially declared smallpox eradicated worldwide.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the history of typography from movable type to digital fonts.
title: Bi Sheng develops movable type in China
description: Movable type printing was developed in Song China.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the history of typography from movable type to digital fonts.
title: Metal movable type used in Korea
description: Korean printers used early metal movable type.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the history of typography from movable type to digital fonts.
title: Jikji printed
description: The Korean Buddhist text Jikji became the oldest known extant book printed with metal movable type.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the history of typography from movable type to digital fonts.
title: Gutenberg develops European movable type system
description: Johannes Gutenberg created a system that transformed printing in Europe.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the history of typography from movable type to digital fonts.
title: Gutenberg Bible completed
description: One of the landmark products of early European typography was printed.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the history of typography from movable type to digital fonts.
title: Roman type standardized in Venice
description: Venetian printers helped establish clear Roman type styles.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the history of typography from movable type to digital fonts.
title: William Caxton establishes press in England
description: English typography took root with Caxton's press at Westminster.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the history of typography from movable type to digital fonts.
title: Aldus Manutius popularizes italic type
description: Italic type became a major innovation in Renaissance typography.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the history of typography from movable type to digital fonts.
title: Claude Garamond begins influential type design career
description: Garamond's typefaces shaped later European book design.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the history of typography from movable type to digital fonts.
title: William Caslon issues influential English typefaces
description: Caslon became a defining name in English typography.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the history of typography from movable type to digital fonts.
title: John Baskerville's refined type gains attention
description: Baskerville style advanced clarity and elegance in print.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the history of typography from movable type to digital fonts.
title: Didot modern type style spreads
description: High-contrast modern serif design became widely influential.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the history of typography from movable type to digital fonts.
title: First commercially successful sans-serif type issued
description: Sans-serif lettering entered print culture in a new way.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the history of typography from movable type to digital fonts.
title: Linotype machine introduced
description: Hot-metal composition revolutionized newspaper and book typesetting.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the history of typography from movable type to digital fonts.
title: Monotype system developed
description: The Monotype system offered an alternative method of mechanized typesetting.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the history of typography from movable type to digital fonts.
title: Futura released
description: Modernist sans-serif type gained a global audience.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the history of typography from movable type to digital fonts.
title: Times New Roman commissioned
description: One of the most influential twentieth-century typefaces was introduced.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the history of typography from movable type to digital fonts.
title: Helvetica released
description: Helvetica became one of the defining typefaces of modern graphic design.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the history of typography from movable type to digital fonts.
title: OCR typefaces standardized for machines
description: Typography adapted to machine reading and data processing.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the history of typography from movable type to digital fonts.
title: Desktop publishing era begins
description: Digital layout and font design became widely accessible with personal computers.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the history of typography from movable type to digital fonts.
title: TrueType introduced
description: Font rendering technology changed digital typography on personal computers.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the history of typography from movable type to digital fonts.
title: Web typography matures
description: The spread of webfonts and digital design expanded typography beyond print.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the development of central banking institutions and policy.
title: Sweden establishes the Riksbank
description: The Riksbank became one of the earliest enduring central banks.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the development of central banking institutions and policy.
title: Bank of England founded
description: The Bank of England became a model for later central banking.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the development of central banking institutions and policy.
title: First Bank of the United States chartered
description: The early United States created a national bank with quasi-central functions.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the development of central banking institutions and policy.
title: Second Bank of the United States chartered
description: The US again created a national bank after the War of 1812.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the development of central banking institutions and policy.
title: Bank Charter Act passed
description: The Bank of England's note-issuing role was further defined in law.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the development of central banking institutions and policy.
title: US National Banking Act passed
description: Federal banking reforms reshaped the US monetary system.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the development of central banking institutions and policy.
title: Reichsbank created
description: The German Empire established a central bank after unification.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the development of central banking institutions and policy.
title: Bank of Japan founded
description: Modern central banking was established in Japan.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the development of central banking institutions and policy.
title: Panic of 1907 shocks US finance
description: The crisis strengthened calls for a US central bank.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the development of central banking institutions and policy.
title: Federal Reserve Act signed
description: The United States created the Federal Reserve System.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the development of central banking institutions and policy.
title: Federal Reserve begins operations
description: The Federal Reserve opened as the US central banking system.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the development of central banking institutions and policy.
title: Great Depression begins
description: Central banking entered a new era of crisis management and controversy.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the development of central banking institutions and policy.
title: Banking Act reforms the Federal Reserve
description: The Fed's structure and powers were significantly revised.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the development of central banking institutions and policy.
title: Bretton Woods conference held
description: A new international monetary order was negotiated.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the development of central banking institutions and policy.
title: International Monetary Fund begins
description: The IMF became a key institution in the postwar monetary system.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the development of central banking institutions and policy.
title: Bundesbank established
description: West Germany created a powerful postwar central bank.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the development of central banking institutions and policy.
title: Nixon ends dollar convertibility to gold
description: The Bretton Woods system effectively came to an end.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the development of central banking institutions and policy.
title: Volcker disinflation begins
description: Aggressive monetary tightening became a landmark in modern central banking.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the development of central banking institutions and policy.
title: European Central Bank established
description: The euro area created a supranational central bank.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the development of central banking institutions and policy.
title: Euro introduced for financial transactions
description: Monetary union in Europe entered into force.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the development of central banking institutions and policy.
title: Global financial crisis prompts extraordinary central bank action
description: Major central banks adopted emergency lending and unconventional policy tools.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the development of central banking institutions and policy.
title: Pandemic-era monetary interventions expand
description: Central banks acted aggressively to stabilize economies during the COVID-19 shock.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the history of human spaceflight from the first orbital missions to long-duration space station operations.
title: Sputnik 1 launched
description: The first artificial satellite accelerated the race to send humans into space.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the history of human spaceflight from the first orbital missions to long-duration space station operations.
title: Yuri Gagarin becomes first person in space
description: Gagarin completed the first human orbital flight.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the history of human spaceflight from the first orbital missions to long-duration space station operations.
title: Alan Shepard makes first US human spaceflight
description: Shepard completed the first American crewed space mission.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the history of human spaceflight from the first orbital missions to long-duration space station operations.
title: John Glenn orbits Earth
description: Glenn became the first American to orbit Earth.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the history of human spaceflight from the first orbital missions to long-duration space station operations.
title: Valentina Tereshkova flies in space
description: Tereshkova became the first woman in space.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the history of human spaceflight from the first orbital missions to long-duration space station operations.
title: First spacewalk conducted
description: Alexei Leonov completed the first extravehicular activity.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the history of human spaceflight from the first orbital missions to long-duration space station operations.
title: Apollo 7 flies
description: NASA's first crewed Apollo mission restored confidence after the Apollo 1 fire.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the history of human spaceflight from the first orbital missions to long-duration space station operations.
title: Apollo 8 orbits the Moon
description: Humans left Earth orbit and circled the Moon for the first time.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the history of human spaceflight from the first orbital missions to long-duration space station operations.
title: Apollo 11 lands on the Moon
description: Neil Armstrong and Buzz Aldrin completed the first crewed lunar landing.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the history of human spaceflight from the first orbital missions to long-duration space station operations.
title: Salyut 1 launched
description: The first space station entered orbit.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the history of human spaceflight from the first orbital missions to long-duration space station operations.
title: Soyuz 11 crew boards space station
description: The first crewed mission to a space station demonstrated prolonged orbital habitation.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the history of human spaceflight from the first orbital missions to long-duration space station operations.
title: Skylab launched
description: The United States launched its first space station.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the history of human spaceflight from the first orbital missions to long-duration space station operations.
title: Apollo-Soyuz Test Project flown
description: American and Soviet spacecraft docked in a symbolic Cold War thaw.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the history of human spaceflight from the first orbital missions to long-duration space station operations.
title: First Space Shuttle mission launched
description: The shuttle era began with Columbia's first flight.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the history of human spaceflight from the first orbital missions to long-duration space station operations.
title: Mir space station launched
description: Mir became a major platform for long-duration missions.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the history of human spaceflight from the first orbital missions to long-duration space station operations.
title: International Space Station assembly begins
description: Construction began on a permanently inhabited multinational space station.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the history of human spaceflight from the first orbital missions to long-duration space station operations.
title: ISS receives first long-duration crew
description: Continuous human presence in orbit began on the ISS.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the history of human spaceflight from the first orbital missions to long-duration space station operations.
title: Shenzhou 5 carries first Chinese taikonaut
description: China became the third nation to send humans into space independently.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the history of human spaceflight from the first orbital missions to long-duration space station operations.
title: Space Shuttle program ends
description: NASA retired the shuttle fleet after three decades of service.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the history of human spaceflight from the first orbital missions to long-duration space station operations.
title: Crew Dragon carries astronauts to orbit
description: Commercial human orbital transport began in partnership with NASA.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the history of human spaceflight from the first orbital missions to long-duration space station operations.
title: Inspiration4 flies private orbital mission
description: A fully private orbital crewed mission expanded commercial human spaceflight.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the history of human spaceflight from the first orbital missions to long-duration space station operations.
title: Long-duration and commercial missions expand
description: Human spaceflight entered a more international and commercial era.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Ottoman Tanzimat Reforms
timeline_description: Major political and legal milestones of the Tanzimat reform era in the Ottoman Empire.
title: Sened-i Ittifak concluded
description: The agreement reflected early efforts to redefine relations between the center and provincial notables.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Ottoman Tanzimat Reforms
timeline_description: Major political and legal milestones of the Tanzimat reform era in the Ottoman Empire.
title: Auspicious Incident destroys Janissaries
description: Mahmud II eliminated the Janissary corps, clearing the way for further reforms.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Ottoman Tanzimat Reforms
timeline_description: Major political and legal milestones of the Tanzimat reform era in the Ottoman Empire.
title: First modern Ottoman census begins
description: Administrative reform increasingly relied on centralized data collection.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Ottoman Tanzimat Reforms
timeline_description: Major political and legal milestones of the Tanzimat reform era in the Ottoman Empire.
title: Balta Liman trade convention signed
description: Commercial agreements with Britain reshaped the empire's economic environment.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Ottoman Tanzimat Reforms
timeline_description: Major political and legal milestones of the Tanzimat reform era in the Ottoman Empire.
title: Gülhane Edict proclaimed
description: The Hatt-ı Şerif of Gülhane opened the Tanzimat era with promises of legal and administrative reform.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Ottoman Tanzimat Reforms
timeline_description: Major political and legal milestones of the Tanzimat reform era in the Ottoman Empire.
title: New penal reforms introduced
description: The Ottoman state began restructuring criminal law and administration.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Ottoman Tanzimat Reforms
timeline_description: Major political and legal milestones of the Tanzimat reform era in the Ottoman Empire.
title: Ottoman lira introduced
description: Monetary reform accompanied broader modernization efforts.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Ottoman Tanzimat Reforms
timeline_description: Major political and legal milestones of the Tanzimat reform era in the Ottoman Empire.
title: Council of Public Instruction established
description: Educational centralization and reform expanded.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Ottoman Tanzimat Reforms
timeline_description: Major political and legal milestones of the Tanzimat reform era in the Ottoman Empire.
title: Slave trade restrictions tightened
description: The empire moved toward greater regulation and restriction of the slave trade.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Ottoman Tanzimat Reforms
timeline_description: Major political and legal milestones of the Tanzimat reform era in the Ottoman Empire.
title: Commercial Code promulgated
description: The Ottoman state adopted new rules for commerce and contracts.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Ottoman Tanzimat Reforms
timeline_description: Major political and legal milestones of the Tanzimat reform era in the Ottoman Empire.
title: Crimean War begins
description: International war shaped the pace and direction of Ottoman reform.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Ottoman Tanzimat Reforms
timeline_description: Major political and legal milestones of the Tanzimat reform era in the Ottoman Empire.
title: Ottoman foreign borrowing begins on a large scale
description: Financial modernization came with growing debt dependence.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Ottoman Tanzimat Reforms
timeline_description: Major political and legal milestones of the Tanzimat reform era in the Ottoman Empire.
title: Reform Edict proclaimed
description: The Hatt-ı Hümayun expanded promises of equality and reform after the Crimean War.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Ottoman Tanzimat Reforms
timeline_description: Major political and legal milestones of the Tanzimat reform era in the Ottoman Empire.
title: Islahat reforms broaden non-Muslim rights
description: The state sought to regularize the status of imperial subjects.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Ottoman Tanzimat Reforms
timeline_description: Major political and legal milestones of the Tanzimat reform era in the Ottoman Empire.
title: Land Code issued
description: Landholding and registration were restructured across the empire.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Ottoman Tanzimat Reforms
timeline_description: Major political and legal milestones of the Tanzimat reform era in the Ottoman Empire.
title: Ottoman Bank gains central role
description: Financial institutions became more important to reform-era governance.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Ottoman Tanzimat Reforms
timeline_description: Major political and legal milestones of the Tanzimat reform era in the Ottoman Empire.
title: Vilayet Law enacted
description: Provincial administration was reorganized under a new system.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Ottoman Tanzimat Reforms
timeline_description: Major political and legal milestones of the Tanzimat reform era in the Ottoman Empire.
title: Nationality Law promulgated
description: The empire defined a common Ottoman subjecthood in legal terms.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Ottoman Tanzimat Reforms
timeline_description: Major political and legal milestones of the Tanzimat reform era in the Ottoman Empire.
title: Public education regulation issued
description: Schooling was more systematically organized under central authority.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Ottoman Tanzimat Reforms
timeline_description: Major political and legal milestones of the Tanzimat reform era in the Ottoman Empire.
title: First Ottoman constitution promulgated
description: Constitutionalism marked a new stage in the reform era.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Ottoman Tanzimat Reforms
timeline_description: Major political and legal milestones of the Tanzimat reform era in the Ottoman Empire.
title: Parliament opened
description: Representative institutions briefly emerged at the imperial center.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Ottoman Tanzimat Reforms
timeline_description: Major political and legal milestones of the Tanzimat reform era in the Ottoman Empire.
title: Parliament suspended
description: Abdülhamid II halted the constitutional experiment, closing the classic Tanzimat era.

timeline_description: Major political, commercial, and cultural milestones in the history of the Phoenicians.
title: Phoenician city-states flourish on the Levantine coast
description: Coastal cities such as Tyre, Sidon, and Byblos rose as major maritime centers.

timeline_description: Major political, commercial, and cultural milestones in the history of the Phoenicians.
title: Byblos maintains strong links with Egypt
description: Phoenician coastal trade connected the Levant closely with Egypt.

timeline_description: Major political, commercial, and cultural milestones in the history of the Phoenicians.
title: Late Bronze Age collapse reshapes eastern Mediterranean trade
description: Phoenician cities adapted successfully to a transformed regional order.

timeline_description: Major political, commercial, and cultural milestones in the history of the Phoenicians.
title: Tyre emerges as a leading city
description: Tyre became one of the most powerful Phoenician states.

timeline_description: Major political, commercial, and cultural milestones in the history of the Phoenicians.
title: Phoenician alphabet spreads
description: The consonantal alphabet associated with Phoenician merchants spread widely.

timeline_description: Major political, commercial, and cultural milestones in the history of the Phoenicians.
title: Hiram I reigns in Tyre
description: Tyre expanded its wealth and diplomatic importance under Hiram I.

timeline_description: Major political, commercial, and cultural milestones in the history of the Phoenicians.
title: Tyre linked to Israelite monarchy
description: Biblical tradition associated Phoenician builders and trade with the kingdoms of David and Solomon.

timeline_description: Major political, commercial, and cultural milestones in the history of the Phoenicians.
title: Phoenician colonies expand westward
description: Settlement and trade networks spread across the Mediterranean.

timeline_description: Major political, commercial, and cultural milestones in the history of the Phoenicians.
title: Carthage traditionally founded
description: Phoenician settlers from Tyre founded one of the great cities of the western Mediterranean.

timeline_description: Major political, commercial, and cultural milestones in the history of the Phoenicians.
title: Assyrian pressure intensifies
description: Neo-Assyrian expansion increasingly constrained Phoenician independence.

timeline_description: Major political, commercial, and cultural milestones in the history of the Phoenicians.
title: Tyre resists Assyrian power
description: Phoenician cities navigated revolt, tribute, and imperial pressure.

timeline_description: Major political, commercial, and cultural milestones in the history of the Phoenicians.
title: Babylonian pressure on Tyre increases
description: Imperial conquest further altered the political landscape of Phoenician cities.

timeline_description: Major political, commercial, and cultural milestones in the history of the Phoenicians.
title: Babylonian dominance deepens in the Levant
description: Phoenician cities were drawn into the post-Jerusalem imperial order.

timeline_description: Major political, commercial, and cultural milestones in the history of the Phoenicians.
title: Persian Empire conquers Babylon
description: Phoenician cities entered the Achaemenid imperial system.

timeline_description: Major political, commercial, and cultural milestones in the history of the Phoenicians.
title: Phoenician fleets serve Persia
description: Phoenician sailors played a major role in Persian naval operations against Greece.

timeline_description: Major political, commercial, and cultural milestones in the history of the Phoenicians.
title: Alexander the Great captures Tyre
description: The siege of Tyre ended the independence of one of the great Phoenician cities.

timeline_description: Major political, commercial, and cultural milestones in the history of the Phoenicians.
title: Hellenistic rule transforms Phoenician cities
description: Phoenician urban centers adapted to new dynastic and cultural conditions.

timeline_description: Major political, commercial, and cultural milestones in the history of the Phoenicians.
title: Punic Wars begin in the west
description: Carthage, founded by Phoenicians, became Rome's great Mediterranean rival.

timeline_description: Major political, commercial, and cultural milestones in the history of the Phoenicians.
title: Carthage destroyed by Rome
description: The destruction of Carthage marked the end of the greatest Phoenician-descended western power.

timeline_description: Major political, commercial, and cultural milestones in the history of the Phoenicians.
title: Phoenician language and identity persist under Roman rule
description: Elements of Phoenician culture endured even as political independence was long gone.

timeline_description: Major military, diplomatic, and political milestones of the War of 1812.
title: Chesapeake-Leopard affair
description: A naval clash intensified tensions between Britain and the United States.

timeline_description: Major military, diplomatic, and political milestones of the War of 1812.
title: Embargo Act passed
description: The United States imposed a trade embargo in response to maritime pressures.

timeline_description: Major military, diplomatic, and political milestones of the War of 1812.
title: Battle of Tippecanoe
description: Conflict in the Northwest fed frontier tensions before the war.

timeline_description: Major military, diplomatic, and political milestones of the War of 1812.
title: United States declares war on Britain
description: The United States formally entered the conflict against Great Britain.

timeline_description: Major military, diplomatic, and political milestones of the War of 1812.
title: First US invasion of Canada begins
description: American forces launched early campaigns into British North America.

timeline_description: Major military, diplomatic, and political milestones of the War of 1812.
title: Detroit surrendered
description: General William Hull surrendered Detroit to British-led forces.

timeline_description: Major military, diplomatic, and political milestones of the War of 1812.
title: Battle of Queenston Heights
description: A failed American attack ended with British and Canadian victory.

timeline_description: Major military, diplomatic, and political milestones of the War of 1812.
title: York captured
description: American forces captured and burned the capital of Upper Canada.

timeline_description: Major military, diplomatic, and political milestones of the War of 1812.
title: Battle of Lake Erie
description: Oliver Hazard Perry won control of Lake Erie for the United States.

timeline_description: Major military, diplomatic, and political milestones of the War of 1812.
title: Battle of the Thames
description: US victory broke British-Indian resistance in the Old Northwest.

timeline_description: Major military, diplomatic, and political milestones of the War of 1812.
title: Creek War ends with Treaty of Fort Jackson
description: The southern theater reshaped Native landholding and US expansion.

timeline_description: Major military, diplomatic, and political milestones of the War of 1812.
title: Battle of Chippawa
description: US forces won one of their best battlefield performances in Canada.

timeline_description: Major military, diplomatic, and political milestones of the War of 1812.
title: Battle of Lundy's Lane
description: One of the war's bloodiest battles ended inconclusively.

timeline_description: Major military, diplomatic, and political milestones of the War of 1812.
title: Washington burned
description: British troops captured and burned major public buildings in the US capital.

timeline_description: Major military, diplomatic, and political milestones of the War of 1812.
title: Bombardment of Fort McHenry
description: The defense of Baltimore inspired The Star-Spangled Banner.

timeline_description: Major military, diplomatic, and political milestones of the War of 1812.
title: Treaty of Ghent signed
description: Peace terms were agreed in Europe, though news traveled slowly.

timeline_description: Major military, diplomatic, and political milestones of the War of 1812.
title: Battle of New Orleans
description: Andrew Jackson won a major victory after the treaty had been signed.

timeline_description: Major military, diplomatic, and political milestones of the War of 1812.
title: Treaty of Ghent ratified
description: Formal ratification ended the war between Britain and the United States.

timeline_description: Major military, diplomatic, and political milestones of the War of 1812.
title: Era of Good Feelings gathers momentum
description: The war's end boosted national confidence in the United States.

timeline_description: Major military, diplomatic, and political milestones of the War of 1812.
title: Rush-Bagot Agreement signed
description: The agreement limited naval armaments on the Great Lakes.
location: United States and British North America

timeline_description: Major cultural milestones in the development of Romanticism in literature, art, and music.
title: Rousseau publishes Émile and The Social Contract
description: Rousseau's writings helped shape themes later associated with Romanticism.

timeline_description: Major cultural milestones in the development of Romanticism in literature, art, and music.
title: Goethe publishes The Sorrows of Young Werther
description: The novel became a landmark of emotional subjectivity and early Romantic sensibility.

timeline_description: Major cultural milestones in the development of Romanticism in literature, art, and music.
title: Kant publishes Critique of Pure Reason
description: Philosophical developments influenced later Romantic thought.

timeline_description: Major cultural milestones in the development of Romanticism in literature, art, and music.
title: French Revolution begins
description: The revolution transformed the political and emotional world of Romantic writers and artists.

timeline_description: Major cultural milestones in the development of Romanticism in literature, art, and music.
title: Lyrical Ballads published
description: Wordsworth and Coleridge launched a decisive moment in English Romantic poetry.

timeline_description: Major cultural milestones in the development of Romanticism in literature, art, and music.
title: Beethoven's Eroica Symphony premiered
description: The symphony marked a major turning point in Romantic music.

timeline_description: Major cultural milestones in the development of Romanticism in literature, art, and music.
title: Faust Part I published
description: Goethe's drama became one of the central works of European Romantic literature.

timeline_description: Major cultural milestones in the development of Romanticism in literature, art, and music.
title: Grimms' Fairy Tales first published
description: Interest in folklore and national tradition became central to Romantic culture.

timeline_description: Major cultural milestones in the development of Romanticism in literature, art, and music.
title: Byron's Childe Harold expands Romantic celebrity
description: Byron became an emblematic Romantic poet and public figure.

timeline_description: Major cultural milestones in the development of Romanticism in literature, art, and music.
title: Napoleonic Wars end
description: The postwar settlement shaped a generation of Romantic politics and culture.

timeline_description: Major cultural milestones in the development of Romanticism in literature, art, and music.
title: Frankenstein published
description: Mary Shelley's novel became a landmark of Romantic and Gothic literature.

timeline_description: Major cultural milestones in the development of Romanticism in literature, art, and music.
title: Schubert's Romantic song culture flourishes
description: Lieder became a major vehicle of Romantic musical expression.

timeline_description: Major cultural milestones in the development of Romanticism in literature, art, and music.
title: Keats dies
description: The early death of Keats deepened his later Romantic mythology.

timeline_description: Major cultural milestones in the development of Romanticism in literature, art, and music.
title: Beethoven's Ninth Symphony premiered
description: The work became one of the great monuments of Romantic music.

timeline_description: Major cultural milestones in the development of Romanticism in literature, art, and music.
title: Hernani premieres
description: Victor Hugo's play became a symbol of Romantic triumph in French theater.

timeline_description: Major cultural milestones in the development of Romanticism in literature, art, and music.
title: Delacroix paints Liberty Leading the People
description: Romantic painting fused political upheaval and dramatic visual style.

timeline_description: Major cultural milestones in the development of Romanticism in literature, art, and music.
title: Notre-Dame de Paris published
description: Hugo's novel extended the reach of French Romanticism.

timeline_description: Major cultural milestones in the development of Romanticism in literature, art, and music.
title: Goethe dies
description: The death of Goethe marked the passing of one of Romanticism's formative figures.

timeline_description: Major cultural milestones in the development of Romanticism in literature, art, and music.
title: Romantic nationalism expands in Europe
description: Romantic ideas increasingly intersected with nationalist politics.

timeline_description: Major cultural milestones in the development of Romanticism in literature, art, and music.
title: Realism challenges Romantic dominance
description: New artistic movements reduced Romanticism's centrality, though its influence endured.

timeline_description: Major political and military milestones of the Mexican Revolution.
title: Porfirio Díaz consolidates power
description: The long Porfiriato set the background for the revolution.

timeline_description: Major political and military milestones of the Mexican Revolution.
title: Díaz signals possible political opening
description: An interview raised hopes that competitive politics might return to Mexico.

timeline_description: Major political and military milestones of the Mexican Revolution.
title: Francisco Madero challenges Díaz
description: Madero emerged as the main opposition figure in the presidential contest.

timeline_description: Major political and military milestones of the Mexican Revolution.
title: Madero calls for revolt
description: The Plan of San Luis Potosí launched the revolutionary uprising.

timeline_description: Major political and military milestones of the Mexican Revolution.
title: Treaty of Ciudad Juárez signed
description: The agreement led to Díaz's resignation.

timeline_description: Major political and military milestones of the Mexican Revolution.
title: Díaz resigns and goes into exile
description: The fall of Díaz ended the Porfiriato.

timeline_description: Major political and military milestones of the Mexican Revolution.
title: Madero elected president
description: Madero became president but struggled to unify revolutionary forces.

timeline_description: Major political and military milestones of the Mexican Revolution.
title: Zapata issues Plan of Ayala
description: Emiliano Zapata denounced Madero and demanded land reform.

timeline_description: Major political and military milestones of the Mexican Revolution.
title: Ten Tragic Days convulse Mexico City
description: A coup and urban fighting toppled Madero's government.

timeline_description: Major political and military milestones of the Mexican Revolution.
title: Madero assassinated
description: The murder of Madero shocked the revolution and radicalized opposition.

timeline_description: Major political and military milestones of the Mexican Revolution.
title: Huerta seizes power
description: Victoriano Huerta established a military regime.

timeline_description: Major political and military milestones of the Mexican Revolution.
title: US occupies Veracruz
description: Foreign intervention intensified the revolutionary crisis.

timeline_description: Major political and military milestones of the Mexican Revolution.
title: Huerta resigns
description: Constitutionalist pressure forced Huerta from office.

timeline_description: Major political and military milestones of the Mexican Revolution.
title: Convention of Aguascalientes opens
description: Revolutionary factions failed to secure lasting unity.

timeline_description: Major political and military milestones of the Mexican Revolution.
title: Villa and Zapata enter Mexico City
description: The symbolic occupation highlighted the fragmentation of the revolution.

timeline_description: Major political and military milestones of the Mexican Revolution.
title: Carranza gains the upper hand
description: Constitutionalist forces defeated major rivals in the civil war.

timeline_description: Major political and military milestones of the Mexican Revolution.
title: Constitution of 1917 promulgated
description: A new constitution redefined the revolutionary state.

timeline_description: Major political and military milestones of the Mexican Revolution.
title: Zapata assassinated
description: The killing of Zapata weakened agrarian revolutionary resistance.

timeline_description: Major political and military milestones of the Mexican Revolution.
title: Carranza overthrown and killed
description: A new political realignment reshaped the postrevolutionary order.

timeline_description: Major political and military milestones of the Mexican Revolution.
title: Álvaro Obregón becomes president
description: The revolution entered a more institutional phase under Obregón.
